certifications.title: AI Infrastructure
certifications.description: Verify the ability to deploy, configure, and validate advanced NVIDIA AI infrastructure.

certifications.title: AI Operations
certifications.description: Demonstrate the skills needed to monitor, troubleshoot, and optimize NVIDIA AI infrastructure.

certifications.title: AI Networking
certifications.description: Showcase the ability to deploy and configure environments that leverage NVIDIA’s advanced networking technologies.

certifications.title: AI Infrastructure and Operations
certifications.description: Validate a candidate’s knowledge of foundational concepts of AI computing related to infrastructure and operations.

certifications.title: Accelerated Data Science
certifications.description: Demonstrate proficiency in leveraging GPU-accelerated tools and libraries for data science workflows.

certifications.title: Accelerated Data Science
certifications.description: Verify a candidate’s understanding of GPU-accelerated data science concepts for preparing data, developing models, and managing end-to-end workflows.

certifications.title: Generative AI LLMs
certifications.description: Certify the ability to design, train, and optimize LLMs, leveraging advanced distributed training and fine-tuning strategies to deliver high-performance AI solutions.

certifications.title: Agentic AI
certifications.description: Demonstrate the ability to build and govern advanced agentic AI solutions with multi-agent interaction, scalability, and ethical safeguards.

certifications.title: Generative AI LLM
certifications.description: Verify foundational knowledge for developing, integrating, and maintaining AI-driven applications using generative AI and LLMs with NVIDIA solutions.

certifications.title: Generative AI Multimodal
certifications.description: Validates the foundational skills needed to design, implement, and manage AI systems that synthesize and interpret data across text, image, and audio modalities.

certifications.title: OpenUSD Development
certifications.description: Verify a candidate’s ability to build, maintain, and optimize 3D content creation pipelines using OpenUSD.
